subcodes.first_line: The letters which the loved ones of God have until now addressed in reply to the violators of the Covenant were solely that perchance these violators might become awakened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رسائلی که در جواب نفوس ناقضه ميثاق تا به حال احبّای الهی مرقوم نمودند محض اينکه شايد ناقضين منتبه می‌شوند
subcodes.subjects: @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @business; financial; property matters, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics
